'''wodhahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabombaceous|cabombaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabombaceous|cabombaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wodhahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhahithi|wodhahithi]] || [[word:wodhahiji|wodhahiji]] || [[word:wodhahishi|wodhahishi]] || [[word:wodhahiki|wodhahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhahuthuthu|wodhahuthuthu]] || [[word:wodhahujuju|wodhahujuju]] || [[word:wodhahushushu|wodhahushushu]] || [[word:wodhahukuku|wodhahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhahuthu|wodhahuthu]] || [[word:wodhahuju|wodhahuju]] || [[word:wodhahushu|wodhahushu]] || [[word:wodhahuku|wodhahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhahufthuf|wodhahufthuf]] || [[word:wodhahufjuf|wodhahufjuf]] || [[word:wodhahufshuf|wodhahufshuf]] || [[word:wodhahufkuf|wodhahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhahethe|wodhahethe]] || [[word:wodhaheje|wodhaheje]] || [[word:wodhaheshe|wodhaheshe]] || [[word:wodhaheke|wodhaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhahothotho|wodhahothotho]] || [[word:wodhahojojo|wodhahojojo]] || [[word:wodhahoshosho|wodhahoshosho]] || [[word:wodhahokoko|wodhahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhahotho|wodhahotho]] || [[word:wodhahojo|wodhahojo]] || [[word:wodhahosho|wodhahosho]] || [[word:wodhahoko|wodhahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhahofthof|wodhahofthof]] || [[word:wodhahofjof|wodhahofjof]] || [[word:wodhahofshof|wodhahofshof]] || [[word:wodhahofkof|wodhahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhahïfthïf|wodhahïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfjïf|wodhahïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfshïf|wodhahïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfkïf|wodhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhahïfthïfthïf|wodhahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfjïfjïf|wodhahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfshïfshïf|wodhahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfkïfkïf|wodhahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhahïfthïf|wodhahïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfjïf|wodhahïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfshïf|wodhahïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfkïf|wodhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhahïfthïf|wodhahïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfjïf|wodhahïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfshïf|wodhahïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhahïfkïf|wodhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhahæthæ|wodhahæthæ]] || [[word:wodhahæjæ|wodhahæjæ]] || [[word:wodhahæshæ|wodhahæshæ]] || [[word:wodhahækæ|wodhahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhahathatha|wodhahathatha]] || [[word:wodhahajaja|wodhahajaja]] || [[word:wodhahashasha|wodhahashasha]] || [[word:wodhahakaka|wodhahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhahatha|wodhahatha]] || [[word:wodhahaja|wodhahaja]] || [[word:wodhahasha|wodhahasha]] || [[word:wodhahaka|wodhahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhahafthaf|wodhahafthaf]] || [[word:wodhahafjaf|wodhahafjaf]] || [[word:wodhahafshaf|wodhahafshaf]] || [[word:wodhahafkaf|wodhahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wodhahasha|wodhahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhahshësha|wodhahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhahrosha|wodhahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhahmusha|wodhahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhahyasha|wodhahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhahnkshësha|gowodhahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhahnkrosha|gowodhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhahnkmusha|gowodhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhahnkyasha|gowodhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wodhadhahasha|wodhadhahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhadhahshësha|wodhadhahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhadhahrosha|wodhadhahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhadhahmusha|wodhadhahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhadhahyasha|wodhadhahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhadhahnkshësha|gowodhadhahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhadhahnkrosha|gowodhadhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhadhahnkmusha|gowodhadhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhadhahnkyasha|gowodhadhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wedhæhasha|wedhæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wedhæhshësha|wedhæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wedhæhrosha|wedhæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wedhæhmusha|wedhæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wedhæhyasha|wedhæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowedhæhnkshësha|gowedhæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowedhæhnkrosha|gowedhæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowedhæhnkmusha|gowedhæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowedhæhnkyasha|gowedhæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wodhfahasha|wodhfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhfahshësha|wodhfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhfahrosha|wodhfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhfahmusha|wodhfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhfahyasha|wodhfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhfahnkshësha|gowodhfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhfahnkrosha|gowodhfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhfahnkmusha|gowodhfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhfahnkyasha|gowodhfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
